claim_boundary: P165 supersedes P160 as the bounded 74-row public-raster overlay-subset, post-hoc runtime-safe disagreement-backfill operating point. P161 remains only a P160-style relative guardrail and is not a P165 generalization proof.

required_claim_language: Use “bounded symbol operating point” for P160, not “solved symbol recognition”.
Disclose 74-row overlay subset and post-hoc geometry/tiny-specialist policy.
Disclose P161 as relative CubiCasa guardrail with overlap, not cross-dataset generalization.
Do not claim >0.95 symbol, full-raster symbol, or end-to-end scene-graph accuracy.
paper_caveats: P165 should be reported as post-hoc runtime-safe disagreement backfill on the 74-row overlay subset; do not treat P161 as a direct P165 generalization guardrail.
